description: Vybit is a notification service that sends personalized sound alerts to users' devices. It lets users create, trigger, share, and subscribe to sound-based notifications and related reminders.
summary: Vybit exposes a REST Developer API at `https://api.vybit.net/v1`, an OAuth2 API at `https://app.vybit.net`, a hosted MCP server at `https://api.vybit.net/v1/mcp`, and a Node-based CLI package `@vybit/cli`; authentication is via Vybit-issued API keys or OAuth2 access tokens depending on the surface.
